title: Worked Example - Calling Methods Using an Object

source.submodule: Classes, Objects and Methods in Java

topicTags: Classes, Objects and Methods in Java

content.problemStatement:
In this example, the program defines two methods: one that prints a message to the console and another that also prints a message to the console.

---

**Expected Output:**
```java
Hello, welcome to Java!
Welcome to the world of Java!
```
